rulings.Case Title: SALEM F MUFARREH VS. BERNARD DAVID WALTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dissolving Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT BERNARD WALTER, RONAN ERICKSON's Motion For Order Dissolving Preliminary Injunction continued to August 1, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later than July 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA L. MASTER VS. TAN ZI MING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order: (1) To Compel Depositions Of Defendants (As Well As Responsive Documents); (2) To Compel Responses Without Objections To Requests For Production Of Documents (As Well As Responsive Documents), Special Interrogatories, And Form Interrogatories; (3) For An Order Deeming Defendants Responses To Requests For Admission To Be Unqualified Admissions; And (4) For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2, 997.50 Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF CONSTATINA MASTER, PAUL MASTER's Motion For An Order: (1) To Compel Depositions Of Defendants (As Well As Responsive Documents); (2) To Compel Responses Without Objections To Requests For Production Of Documents (As Well As Responsive Documents), Special Interrogatories, And Form Interrogatories; (3) For An Order Deeming Defendants Responses To Requests For Admission To Be Unqualified Admissions; And (4) For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2, 997.50 Against Defendants OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOI YUEN CHOW VS. NU MAC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANTS NU MAC, CAU QUAN, AHN NGUYEN, QUAN QUE, BINH QUAN, CAU QUAN, WENDY DANG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHICHAO LIANG VS. CELIA PAZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Notion To Vacate The Default Judgment Or In The Alternatie Petition For Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2016 line 6. DEFENDANT CELIA PAZ's Motion To Vacate The Default Judgment Or In The Alternatie Petition For Relief GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Relief From Forfeiture is DENIED. Motion to Vacate Default per CCP 473(b) is GRANTED as follows: (1) Defendant shall file an answer no later than July 12, 2016 by 4:00 p.m.; (2) Defendant shall post with the Court $ 567.91 no later than July 12, 2016 by 4:00 p.m.; (3) Defendant shall remit to Plaintiff's counsel $170 no later than July 12, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE VS. DIEGO DE LEO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories - Ud, Req For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2016 line 7. DEFENDANT DIEGO DELEO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Sanctions GRANTED as follows: within 5 days of notice of entry of order Plaintiff shall provide responses to the following (1) Do you have an opinion on the fair market value of the Premises (as defined in the Complaint)? and subparts (a)-(c) of Form Interrogatory-UD 81.1; and (2) Has any other person ever expressed to you an opinion of the fair market value of the Premises (as defined in the Complaint)? and subparts (a)-(c) of Form Interrogatory-UD 81.2. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)
